description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow set within a neatly hedged lot, featuring a spacious driveway, a detached garage, and multiple mature trees providing shade. The main building has a hip roof and a large covered porch that wraps around the front and side, with symmetrical windows and a central entrance. The backyard includes a circular pool, a patio with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, and a small play area with a swing set. A secondary structure, possibly a guest house or garden shed, is located near the rear, adjacent to the pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a well-maintained hedge and a gated driveway, with two cars parked in front. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and privacy.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, large porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and play area, all enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large covered porch, driveway, two parked cars, and detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, wraparound porch, driveway leading to the garage, and the hedge-enclosed lot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a circular pool, patio furniture, umbrella, secondary structure, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the play area with a swing set, pool, and the rear of the garage and house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
